source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ 국내 제조인증/1. 최초/03 기술문서 심사에 관한 자료/03 제품의 성능 및 안전을 확인하기 위한 자료/04 성능에 관한 자료/A1417MCW,A1717MCW,F1417MCW_호환성_레포트_2022.11.17.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Test report checking XAS_W version 2.3.0.3 and Bright calibration file naming for A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW units.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Performance-related technical documentation for domestic manufacturing certification source package.
keyPoints: Test purpose: check the bright calibration file name change.
Test environment used Windows 10 Professional English 64bit, XAS_W Version 2.3.0.3, and A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW 3EA.
Test criteria required the Bright name to be created as Bright01_xx_xxx.raw.
Both Tester 1 and Tester 2 recorded pass results for version information and Bright name creation checks.

entities.name: Windows 10 Professional English 64bit
entities.evidence: -. OS : Windows 10 Professional English 64bit after lastest updates

concepts.name: Bright calibration file name change

concepts.name: Version information check
concepts.evidence: Check that the version information appears as 2.3.0.3

concepts.name: Bright file naming criterion
concepts.evidence: Make sure that the Bright name is created as Bright01_xx_xxx.raw.

concepts.name: Detector menu version read workflow
concepts.evidence: Press the Detector menu tab. -. Click the Version Read button and check the version information.

concepts.name: Calibration menu Get Bright workflow
concepts.evidence: Press the Calibration menu tab. -. Click the Get Bright button and check if the changed file name is created.
